title: Extract shared root-resolution helper in config::mod.rs
action: Extract the root-selection logic ensure_config already uses (home().join("projects") when that directory exists, else home()) into a new pub(crate) fn default_config_root(home: &std::path::Path) -> std::path::PathBuf, placed next to default_config_json (per D2). Refactor ensure_config (mod.rs:865) to call default_config_root(&home()) instead of inlining the projects-fallback. This is the shared helper doctor's corrupt-recreate path and the new installer-facing CLI branch (later cells) will both reuse, per D2's 'never re-derive' rule applied to root-selection, not just JSON emission. Use crate:: for any internal reference to this crate, never herdr_go:: (this file is inside the lib crate). No behavior change: for the same HOME, ensure_config's written config.json must be byte-identical before and after.

truths: ensure_config's default JSON is byte-identical before and after this refactor for the same HOME

artifacts.substantive: exports pub(crate) fn default_config_root(home: &Path) -> PathBuf; ensure_config calls it instead of inlining the projects-fallback

prohibitions: No change to default_config_json's signature, output, or existing callers

verify: grep -q 'fn default_config_root' src/config/mod.rs && grep -q 'default_config_root(&home())' src/config/mod.rs && ! grep -q 'herdr_go::' src/config/mod.rs && cargo test --quiet ensure_config_creates_a_working_default_then_reloads && cargo test --quiet ensure_config_seeds_default_agent_presets

trace.outcome: Extracted default_config_root(home) helper in src/config/mod.rs, deduplicating the projects-fallback root-selection logic; ensure_config now calls it instead of inlining. No change to default_config_json signature/output/callers. Verify green: grep checks + both targeted cargo tests pass.
trace.verify_output: grep checks pass; both cargo tests pass (ensure_config_creates_a_working_default_then_reloads: ok, ensure_config_seeds_default_agent_presets: ok); exit code 0
trace.verify_command: grep -q 'fn default_config_root' src/config/mod.rs && grep -q 'default_config_root(&home())' src/config/mod.rs && ! grep -q 'herdr_go::' src/config/mod.rs && cargo test --quiet ensure_config_creates_a_working_default_then_reloads && cargo test --quiet ensure_config_seeds_default_agent_presets
